payload.body:
Yes, this is still relevant, but it is partially addressed.

I would keep the ticket open. The current desktop code still has the main cleanup targets: repeated SQLite row casts in `DesktopAgentChatStore.ts` / `DesktopAgentSessionStore.ts`, duplicated JSON helper patterns across those stores, ChatPanel-local protocol normalization for threads/messages/activities/questions/providers, and a still-large `cycleApiClient.ts` that mixes API discovery, HTTP decoding, path/query helpers, ticket-draft websocket startup, and alias routing.

Some work has landed already: `src/renderer/lib/chatProtocol.ts` now covers the outer websocket message envelope, and there are targeted invalid-JSON fallback tests for the stores. So I would treat this as a remaining consolidation/splitting task rather than stale triage.
